summary:
🎓 UX Psychology Tip: Peak-end Rule

The Peak-end Rule states that people judge an experience largely based on how they felt at its peak and at its end, rather than the total sum of every moment.

💡 Design Tip: Create memorable peak experiences and ensure endings are positive. A great finale can make up for mediocre middle parts.

Example: Disney World focuses on spectacular parade finales.
